SourceProxy.label: SHYX Adaptive Isotropic Remesher
SourceProxy.name: SHYXAdaptiveIsotropicRemesher

Documentation.short_help: Curvature-aware CGAL remesh with min/max edge length.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
Adaptive isotropic remeshing using CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field (discrete curvature). Edge lengths are bounded by Min/Max Edge Length; Adaptive Tolerance controls fineness together with curvature. The remesh face subset is chosen either from an optional vtkSelection on port 1 or from a scalar value range on the input (see Remesh region); when that subset is empty, the whole surface is remeshed. Edges on the boundary between remeshed and untouched triangles are constrained as feature edges (independent of the Detect feature edges master toggle).
Detect feature edges (master toggle): when ON (default), CGAL detect_sharp_edges and feature-mask region/boundary contributions are added to the constraint maps for remesh and smooth_shape. When OFF, those sources are skipped; only selection / scalar-range patch boundaries constrain remeshing/smoothing, and output port 1 is empty.
Post-remesh smooth_shape uses the same Protection Angle for sharp edges; with Feature Mask enabled it re-evaluates the same array/threshold on the remeshed surface (after attribute interpolation) to clip features and to mark mask-region boundaries.
Outputs: 0 Remeshed (and optionally shape-smoothed) surface. 1 Sharp/feature edges (lines) and (only if Shape Smooth Iterations > 0) the constrained feature points (verts). Empty when Detect feature edges is OFF. 2 Input geometry, faces passing the feature mask threshold. 3 Remeshed geometry, faces passing the feature mask threshold (mask patch on output).
Requires CGAL 6.0+.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.label: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Optional vtkSelection used when Remesh region source is "Selection (port 1)" (default). When present and non-empty, CGAL remeshing is applied only to the indicated faces (same convention as SHYX Delete Selected Cells). If the port is unset or the selection yields no cells, the whole surface is remeshed. When Remesh region source is "Scalar range on input", this port is ignored for choosing the remesh subset. The boundary between remeshed and untouched faces is constrained as feature edges for remesh and smooth_shape (with Protection Angle / Feature Mask rules).

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRegionMode
IntVectorProperty.label: Remesh region source
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: How the patch of faces passed to CGAL isotropic remeshing is chosen. Selection uses the vtkSelection input when it resolves to cells. Scalar range includes all cells whose chosen array tuple magnitude lies in [Remesh range min, Remesh range max] (inclusive), with the same point- vs cell-array rules as Feature Mask; port 1 is then ignored for this subset.

StringVectorProperty.name: RemeshRangeArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Range array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point- or cell-centered array on the input. If both exist with the same name, cell data is used. A cell is in the remesh region when tuple magnitude is between Remesh range min and max (inclusive).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: RemeshRangeMin
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Remesh range min
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Inclusive lower bound on tuple magnitude for cells in the remesh region (scalar range mode).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: RemeshRangeMax
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Remesh range max
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Inclusive upper bound; must be >= Remesh range min.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRangeAllScalars
IntVectorProperty.label: Range: all corners (points)
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When the range array is point-centered: if ON, every corner of a cell must fall inside the range; if OFF, one in-range corner is enough. Ignored for cell-centered arrays.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Min edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length; must be > 0. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.001) suggests 0.1% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side; use Scale/Reset next to the property.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: MaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Max edge length

DoubleVectorProperty.name: AdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Adaptive tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field tolerance. Smaller values tend to refine more within the Min/Max edge length bounds.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureSizingStandAlone
IntVectorProperty.label: Feature sizing stand-alone
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When OFF (default), the whole surface uses the global Min/Max edge length and Adaptive tolerance above; behavior is identical to the previous version. When ON, feature/constrained edges (sharp + feature-mask region/boundary + selection boundary) use a SEPARATE Adaptive_sizing_field built from Feature min/max edge length and Feature adaptive tolerance, while the rest of the surface keeps using the global field. Other options (Protect / Collapse / Relax constraints, Allow split / collapse / flip, etc.) are unaffected. With Protect constraints ON, the feature field has no practical effect because feature edges are not split nor collapsed (only the tangential-relaxation target at their endpoints is altered).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMinEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature min edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Minimum edge length on feature/constrained edges (used only when Feature sizing stand-alone is ON); must be > 0. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.001) suggests 0.1% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaxEdgeLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature max edge length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum edge length on feature/constrained edges (used only when Feature sizing stand-alone is ON); must be > Feature min edge length. ParaView BoundsDomain (scaled_extent 0.05) suggests 5% of the input axis-aligned bounding box longest side.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureAdaptiveTolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Feature adaptive tolerance
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field tolerance for feature/constrained edges (used only when Feature sizing stand-alone is ON). Smaller values refine feature edges more within their Feature min/max bounds.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureSizingUsePolylineCurvature
IntVectorProperty.label: Feature sizing: polyline curvature
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When Feature sizing stand-alone is ON: if ON, target edge lengths on constrained feature edges use **3D polyline (Menger) curvature** at crease vertices instead of surface principal curvatures. If OFF (default), feature sizing uses the same interpolated_corrected surface curvatures as the global field (previous behavior).

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRecomputeCurvatureEachIteration
IntVectorProperty.label: Recompute curvature each iteration
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When OFF (default), adaptive sizing runs interpolated_corrected_curvatures once before remeshing (CGAL Adaptive_sizing_field / Vespa dual-field constructor); split vertices only inherit sizes by averaging neighbors during remesh. When ON, each remesh iteration runs separately and ICC is re-evaluated on the **current** mesh before starting the next iteration (dual stand-alone field: FeatureAwareAdaptiveSizingField::recompute_curvature; single field: new Adaptive_sizing_field each pass). Refresh uses the **full** surface for ICC when dual sizing has already built patch-expanded curvature on the first pass only. Much slower when Remesh iterations is large.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfRelaxationSteps
IntVectorProperty.label: Relaxation steps
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL vertex-relocation steps per remesh iteration (higher = smoother surface; 0 disables relaxation).

IntVectorProperty.name: DetectFeatureEdges
IntVectorProperty.label: Detect feature edges
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Master switch for sharp-edge / feature-mask constraints. When ON (default), CGAL detect_sharp_edges (with Protection angle / Sharp side filter) and feature-mask region / boundary contributions are added to edge_is_constrained_map for isotropic_remeshing and to vertex_is_constrained_map for smooth_shape. When OFF, none of those sources contribute; remesh and smooth_shape only see vtkSelection-boundary constraints (when a selection input is connected). vtkSelection behavior is independent of this toggle. Output port 1 is empty when OFF.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Sharp-edge angle threshold in degrees (CGAL detect_sharp_edges). Endpoints of detected sharp edges are protected during remesh and pinned during smooth_shape.

IntVectorProperty.name: SharpFeatureSideFilter
IntVectorProperty.label: Sharp side filter
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Optional filter on interior sharp edges after CGAL detect_sharp_edges, using signed dihedral angle (approximate_dihedral_angle). Excludes concave (signed < 0) or convex (signed > 0) from remesh / shape constraints and from port 1. Boundary edges are unchanged. If convex/concave looks swapped, flip mesh orientation or pick the other entry.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskEnabled
IntVectorProperty.label: Use feature mask
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When ON: threshold input faces to port 2; port 1 sharp features are computed only on that patch; on the full surface, sharp edges are intersected with the mask for CGAL remesh / smooth_shape. Choose a point- or cell-centered array, a threshold (tuple magnitude > threshold), and the optional All Scalars flag for point arrays. Has no effect when Detect feature edges is OFF.

StringVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of a point- or cell-centered array. If both exist with the same name, cell data is used. Tuple magnitude must be > Threshold for a cell (or per-point corner) to pass.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskThreshold
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Threshold
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Cells pass when tuple magnitude is strictly greater than this value (scalar or vector magnitude). Typical: 0 to keep values > 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: FeatureMaskAllScalars
IntVectorProperty.label: All scalars
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When the chosen array is point-centered: if ON, every corner of a cell must pass the magnitude test; if OFF, one passing corner is enough (vtkThreshold-style). Ignored when the array resolves to cell data.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshProtectConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Protect constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `protect_constraints`. When ON, feature edges are neither split nor collapsed. When OFF, constrained edges may be split or collapsed per CGAL (subject to Collapse constraints below).

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshCollapseConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Collapse constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `collapse_constraints`. When Protect constraints is OFF, allows collapsing constrained edges. Ignored by CGAL when Protect constraints is ON.

IntVectorProperty.name: RemeshRelaxConstraints
IntVectorProperty.label: Relax constraints
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL `relax_constraints`. When ON, endpoints of constrained and boundary edges may move along constrained polylines during tangential relaxation.

IntVectorProperty.name: ShapeSmoothingIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Post-remesh CGAL smooth_shape iterations. 0 disables. Sharp-edge vertices (Protection Angle) and Feature-Mask boundary vertices stay fixed.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ShapeSmoothingTimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Time step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: CGAL smooth_shape time step (smoothing speed). Typical range about 1e-6 to 1. Used only when Shape-smoothing Iterations > 0.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, point/cell data are interpolated onto the new mesh.
